subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! This is Thy servant who hath grown heedless of the wondrous tokens of Thy remembrance, and whom transgressions have veiled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحانک اللهم یا الهی هذا عبدک الذی غفل عن بدایع ذکرک و احجبته الخطایا علی
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for forgiveness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
